choose.when:
FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SIBWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBWCS RIBWCS ON SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = RIBWCS.IB_SEQ WHERE 1 = 1
AND RIBWCS.IB_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND RIBWCS.IB_SEQ IS NULL
AND SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIBWCS.STATUS <> 'REJECTED'
AND (SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIBWCS.STATUS = 'REJECTED')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SOBWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = ROBWCS.OB_SEQ WHERE 1 = 1
AND ROBWCS.OB_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND ROBWCS.OB_SEQ IS NULL
AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND ROBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND ROBWCS.STATUS <> 'ABANDONED'
AND (SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR ROBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR ROBWCS.STATUS = 'ABANDONED')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SRMWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SRMWCS SRMWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RRMWCS RRMWCS ON SRMWCS.RM_SEQ = RRMWCS.RM_SEQ
WHERE RRMWCS.RM_SEQ IS NOT NULL
WHERE RRMWCS.RM_SEQ IS NULL
AND SRMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RRMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RRMWCS.STATUS <> 'ABANDONED'
AND (SRMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RRMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RRMWCS.STATUS = 'ABANDONED')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SIVMMWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SIVMMWCS SIVMMWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIVMMWCS RIVMMWCS ON SIVMMWCS.IVMM_SEQ = RIVMMWCS.IVMM_SEQ WHERE 1 = 1
AND RIVMMWCS.IVMM_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND RIVMMWCS.IVMM_SEQ IS NULL
AND SIVMMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIVMMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIVMMWCS.STATUS <> 'ABANDONED'
AND (SIVMMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIVMMWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIVMMWCS.STATUS = 'ABANDONED')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SIVHDWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SIVHDWCS SIVHDWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIVHDWCS RIVHDWCS ON SIVHDWCS.IVHD_NUMBER = RIVHDWCS.IVHD_NUMBER WHERE 1 = 1
AND RIVHDWCS.IVHD_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
AND RIVHDWCS.IVHD_NUMBER IS NULL
AND SIVHDWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIVHDWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'
AND (SIVHDWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIVHDWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SIVWCS.* FROM (SELECT TIS.CTKEY , TIS.OWKEY , TIS.IV_NUMBER , TIS.LOCATION_CODE , TIS.SUCCEEDED , TIS.ERROR_VALUE , TIS.ERROR_REASON , TIS.WCS_INTERFACE_ID , TIS.WMS_INTERFACE_ID , TIS.INSERTDATE , TIS.INSERTURKEY , TIS.UPDATEDATE , TIS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SIVWCS TIS) SIVWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIVWCS RIVWCS ON SIVWCS.IV_NUMBER = RIVWCS.IV_NUMBER WHERE 1 = 1
AND RIVWCS.IV_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
AND RIVWCS.IV_NUMBER IS NULL
AND SIVWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIVWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'
AND (SIVWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIVWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SIBWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SIBWCS SIBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RIBWCS RIBWCS ON SIBWCS.IB_SEQ = RIBWCS.IB_SEQ WHERE 1 = 1
AND RIBWCS.IB_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND RIBWCS.IB_SEQ IS NULL
AND SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND RIBWCS.STATUS <> 'REJECTED'
AND (SIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR RIBWCS.STATUS = 'REJECTED')
) A

FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT SOBWCS.* FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITWCS ROBUNITWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = ROBUNITWCS.OB_SEQ WHERE 1 = 1
AND ROBUNITWCS.OB_SEQ IS NOT NULL
AND ROBUNITWCS.OB_SEQ IS NULL
AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND ROBUNITWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND ROBUNITWCS.STATUS <> 'ABANDONED'
AND (SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR ROBUNITWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'false' OR ROBUNITWCS.STATUS = 'ABANDONED')
) A

if.if: AND REQ_TYPE_CD = (SELECT CTCD_DTVALUE FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{CTKEY_COND} AND CTCD_HDKEY = 'WCS_REQ_TYPE' AND CTCD_DTKEY = #{REQ_TYPE_CD_COND})

mapper.select: /* IfWcsMoniterMapper.selectOmsOb - 출고오더 */ WITH MASTER_DATA AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY HDDT, ACKEY, DELIVERYKEY) AS LV , TT.* FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AS HDDT , 'W9991100' AS CTKEY, NULL AS TO_CTKEY , 'WELLFOOD-INCHEON' AS ACKEY, '2200056071' AS DELIVERYKEY , 'RD05' AS OUT_ORTYPE , '1111' AS SALES, '1111' AS DELIVERY ) TT ) , ITEM_DATA AS ( SELECT ICKEY, QTY, UOM, DTKEY, OBCOST , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DTKEY DESC) AS LASTKEY FROM ( SELECT ICKEY, QTY, UOM, OBCOST , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ICKEY, QTY DESC) * 10 AS DTKEY FROM ( SELECT '510000008' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 1500 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000374' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 306 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000066' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 871 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000155' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 1500 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000004' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 306 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000001' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 871 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000003' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 1500 AS OBCOST UNION ALL SELECT '510000111' AS ICKEY, ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) AS QTY, 'BOX' AS UOM, 306 AS OBCOST ) IT ) IIT ) SELECT DTKEY , LV , CASE WHEN DTKEY=10 THEN '{"BODY":{"DATA_H":[' || OUT_MASTER || ']' ELSE NULL END AS OUT_MASTER , CASE WHEN DTKEY=10 THEN CHR(10)||',"DATA_D":[' ELSE ', ' END || OUT_DETAIL || CASE WHEN LASTKEY=1 THEN '] }}' ELSE NULL END AS OUT_DETAIL FROM ( SELECT I.DTKEY , I.LASTKEY , T.LV , '{"INDI_NO"'||':'||'"'||T.OUT_EXTERNORDERKEY||'"' || ', "INDIPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.CTKEY||'"' || ', "REPPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.TO_CTKEY||'"' || ', "SCUST_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.ACKEY||'"' || ', "KUNNR"'||':'||'"'||T.DELIVERYKEY||'"' || ', "INDI_DATE"'||':'||'"'||T.HDDT||'"' || ', "PK_TYP"'||':'||'"'||T.OUT_ORTYPE||'"' || ', "ZPERNR"'||':'||'"'||T.SALES||'"' || ', "ZPERNR_DSM"'||':'||'"'||T.DELIVERY||'"' || ', "REF_DOC"'||':'||'"'||T.OUT_REFERENCEKEY||'"' || '}' AS OUT_MASTER , '{"INDI_NO"'||':'||'"'||T.OUT_EXTERNORDERKEY||'"' || ', "INDI_SEQ"'||':'||'"'||I.DTKEY||'"' || ', "INDIPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.CTKEY||'"' || ', "INDI_DATE"'||':'||'"'||T.HDDT||'"' || ', "ITEM_CD"'||':'||'"'||I.ICKEY||'"' || ', "SALES_UNIT"'||':'||'"'||II.ICUNITTYPE||'"' || ', "INDI_QTY"'||':'||'"'||I.QTY||'"' || ', "INDICNV_QTY"'||':'||'"'||(I.QTY * II.ICUTQTY)||'"' || ', "REF_DOC"'||':'||'"'||T.OUT_REFERENCEKEY||'"' || ', "REF_DOC_SEQ"'||':'||'"'||I.DTKEY||'"' || ', "ADJ_UCOST"'||':'||'"'||I.OBCOST||'"' || ', "INDI_AMT"'||':'||'"'||(I.QTY *II.ICUNITQTY* I.OBCOST)||'"' || '}'AS OUT_DETAIL FROM ( SELECT M.LV , M.HDDT, M.CTKEY, M.TO_CTKEY, M.ACKEY, M.DELIVERYKEY , M.OUT_ORTYPE , M.SALES, M.DELIVERY , IM.EXTERNORDERKEY AS IN_EXTERNORDERKEY, IM.REFERENCEKEY AS IN_REFERENCEKEY , OM.EXTERNORDERKEY AS OUT_EXTERNORDERKEY, OM.REFERENCEKEY AS OUT_REFERENCEKEY FROM MASTER_DATA M JOIN (SELECT CAST(MAX(B.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CAST(MAX(B.REFERENCEKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS REFERENCEKEY , A.LV FROM MASTER_DATA A JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON B.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY LIKE '7%' GROUP BY A.LV ) IM ON M.LV = IM.LV JOIN (SELECT CAST(MAX(B.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CAST(MAX(B.REFERENCEKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS REFERENCEKEY , A.LV FROM MASTER_DATA A JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON B.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY LIKE '8%' GROUP BY A.LV ) OM ON M.LV = OM.LV ) T JOIN ITEM_DATA I ON 1=1 JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT IC.ICKEY, IC.ICUNITKEY, IU.ICUNITTYPE, IU.ICUNITQTY , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY IC.ICUNITKEY ORDER BY IU.ICUNITORDER, IU.ICUNITQTY DESC, CASE IU.ICUNITTYPE WHEN 'BOL' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS LV FROM TADMIN_MST_IC IC JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY JOIN ITEM_DATA ID ON IC.ICKEY = ID.ICKEY AND IU.ICUNITTYPE = ID.UOM WHERE IC.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' ) L WHERE 1 = 1 ) II ON I.ICKEY = II.ICKEY AND I.UOM = II.ICUNITTYPE ) TT ORDER BY TT.LV, TT.DTKEY

/* IfWcsMoniterMapper.selectOmsIb - 입고오더 */ WITH MASTER_DATA AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY HDDT, ACKEY, DELIVERYKEY) AS LV , TT.* FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AS HDDT , 'W9991100' AS CTKEY, NULL AS TO_CTKEY , 'WELLFOOD-INCHEON' AS ACKEY, '2200009578' AS DELIVERYKEY , 'RD51' AS IN_ORTYPE , '1111' AS SALES, '1111' AS DELIVERY ) TT ) , ITEM_DATA AS ( SELECT ICKEY, QTY, DTKEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY DTKEY DESC) AS LASTKEY FROM ( SELECT ICKEY, QTY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ICKEY, QTY DESC) * 10 AS DTKEY FROM ( SELECT A.ICKEY , COALESCE(B.LAYERPERPALLERT, 1) * COALESCE(B.QUANTYTYPERLAYESRS, 1) * ROUND(floor(random() * (5 - 2 + 1) + 2),0) -- * CASE WHEN A.ICKEY IN ('510004388','510000935') THEN 50 ELSE 1 END AS QTY , B.ICUTTYPE AS UOM FROM TADMIN_MST_IC A , TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE B WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICUTKEY = B.ICUTKEY AND A.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND B.CTKEY = 'W9991100' AND B.ICUTTYPE = 'BOX' AND A.ICKEY IN ( '610000284' , '610000285' , '610000289' , '610000290' , '610000291' , '610001271' , '610001272' , '610001171' , '610001187' , '610001838' , '611000021' , '610000941' , '610000942' , '611000112' , '610001848' , '610001849' , '610001851' , '610000896' , '610001836' , '610000278' , '610001105' , '511000234' , '511000241' , '511000242' , '511000243' , '511000257' , '511000258' , '511000381' , '511000231' ) ) IT ) IIT ) SELECT DTKEY , LV , CASE WHEN DTKEY=10 THEN '{"BODY":{"DATA_H":[' || IN_MASTER || ']' ELSE NULL END AS IN_MASTER , CASE WHEN DTKEY=10 THEN CHR(10)||',"DATA_D":[' ELSE ', ' END || IN_DETAIL || CASE WHEN LASTKEY=1 THEN '] }}' ELSE NULL END AS IN_DETAIL FROM ( SELECT I.DTKEY , I.LASTKEY , T.LV , '{"ISS_NO"'||':'||'"'||T.IN_EXTERNORDERKEY||'"' || ', "REPPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.CTKEY||'"' || ', "ISSPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.TO_CTKEY||'"' || ', "ISS_DATE"'||':'||'"'||T.HDDT||'"' || ', "KUNNR"'||':'||'"'||T.DELIVERYKEY||'"' || ', "PA_TYP"'||':'||'"'||T.IN_ORTYPE||'"' || ', "REF_DOC"'||':'||'"'||T.IN_REFERENCEKEY||'"' || '}' AS IN_MASTER , '{"ISS_NO"'||':'||'"'||T.IN_EXTERNORDERKEY||'"' || ', "ISS_SEQ"'||':'||'"'||I.DTKEY||'"' || ', "REPPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.CTKEY||'"' || ', "ISSPART_CD"'||':'||'"'||T.TO_CTKEY||'"' || ', "ITEM_CD"'||':'||'"'||I.ICKEY||'"' || ', "SALES_UNIT"'||':'||'"'||II.ICUNITTYPE||'"' || ', "ISS_QTY"'||':'||'"'||I.QTY||'"' || ', "ISSCNV_QTY"'||':'||'"'||(I.QTY * II.ICUNITQTY)||'"' || ', "REF_DOC"'||':'||'"'||T.IN_REFERENCEKEY||'"' || ', "REF_DOC_SEQ"'||':'||'"'||I.DTKEY||'"' || '}'AS IN_DETAIL FROM ( SELECT M.LV , M.HDDT, M.CTKEY, M.TO_CTKEY, M.ACKEY, M.DELIVERYKEY , M.IN_ORTYPE , M.SALES, M.DELIVERY , IM.EXTERNORDERKEY AS IN_EXTERNORDERKEY, IM.REFERENCEKEY AS IN_REFERENCEKEY , OM.EXTERNORDERKEY AS OUT_EXTERNORDERKEY, OM.REFERENCEKEY AS OUT_REFERENCEKEY FROM MASTER_DATA M JOIN (SELECT CAST(MAX(B.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CAST(MAX(B.REFERENCEKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS REFERENCEKEY , A.LV FROM MASTER_DATA A JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON B.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY LIKE '7%' GROUP BY A.LV ) IM ON M.LV = IM.LV JOIN (SELECT CAST(MAX(B.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS EXTERNORDERKEY , CAST(MAX(B.REFERENCEKEY) AS NUMERIC) + A.LV AS REFERENCEKEY , A.LV FROM MASTER_DATA A JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD B ON B.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND B.EXTERNORDERKEY LIKE '8%' GROUP BY A.LV ) OM ON M.LV = OM.LV ) T JOIN ITEM_DATA I ON 1=1 JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT IC.ICKEY, IC.ICUNITKEY, IU.ICUNITTYPE, IU.ICUNITQTY , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY IC.ICUNITKEY ORDER BY IU.ICUNITORDER, IU.ICUNITQTY DESC, CASE IU.ICUNITTYPE WHEN 'BOL' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END) AS LV FROM TADMIN_MST_IC IC JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND IU.ICUNITORDER = 1 WHERE IC.OWKEY = 'WELLFOOD' AND IC.ICKEY IN (SELECT ICKEY FROM ITEM_DATA) ) L WHERE L.LV = 1 ) II ON I.ICKEY = II.ICKEY ) TT ORDER BY TT.LV, TT.DTKEY

/* IfWcsMoniterMapper.selectJsonData - WCS인터페이스 모니텅리 JSON 조회 */ SELECT IFID , IFNM , TYPE , REQMODULE , REQDT , STATUS , STATUSCD , ISPROCESS , REQDATA , COALESCE(RESDATA, RRMSG) AS RESDATA , ERRMSG , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM INTERFACE_LOG WHERE IFID = #{interfaceId}
SELECT CTCD_DTKEY , CTCD_DTVALUE FROM TWORK_MST_CTCD_DT WHERE CTCD_HDKEY = 'WCS_IF_LIST' AND CTKEY = #{@com.daiso.wms.interfaces.common.WcsPropertyUtil@CTKEY}
